data.content: Plan review: APPROVED. Root cause correctly identified — parent knots forced through Scene orchestration path which asserts claimability on children that may not be claimable. Fix approach is sound: split UI label and terminal-manager session path by memory-manager type (knots parents → Take, beads parents → Scene). _repoPath already available in UI for type detection. Test strategy covers both regression paths. Minor suggestion: inline the helper in beat-columns.tsx rather than creating a separate utility file.
